name: akarelin-skills
description: Personal productivity plugins for Claude Code — agentic cognition, file organization, workplace tools, and administration.

plugins.name: core
plugins.description: Core agent primitives: memory, sessions, skills, agents, and learning.

plugins.name: manage
plugins.description: Session and skill management: sync, list, resume, patch, test, deploy.

plugins.name: organize
plugins.description: File organizer: arxiv papers and medical scans to Obsidian.

plugins.name: work
plugins.description: Workplace productivity: M365, Google (Gmail + Drive), Slack (MCP), Jira/Confluence (MCP).

plugins.name: administer
plugins.description: Cloud and tenant administration: M365 tenant admin and GCP resource management.

plugins.name: research
plugins.description: Search and data exploration: knowledge search across providers, Neo4j graph queries, SQL database exploration.
